title: Tails wagging in waiting at Odin
description: GEORGE NEWS - Odin is a passionate...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Odin is a passionate non-profit dedicated to educating pet owners and helping lovable dogs, cats, puppies, and kittens find their perfect match.


> Their premises are alive with wagging tails and hopeful hearts.


This is where animals wait to meet their forever families. To find out more, adopt a pet, or get involved, contact Colleen Smith at 072 084 1374.

Chrissy is a funny, young, bright and well-socialised supergirl!

Kosi is a lovely, friendly gentleman of about five years old. He is well-socialised, with a lovely character.

Miles is a typical all-rounder. He is gentle, social and eager to please.

Kolle is about five years old. She is well-socialised and a behaved, loyal girl.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
